title: Coconut Breakfast Halwa
description: A traditional Indian dessert-like breakfast made with coconut and halal ingredients.
instructions: 1. In a large saucepan, heat the ghee over medium heat.
2. Add the desiccated coconut and cook, stirring occasionally, until lightly toasted.
3. Add the milk, sugar, and cardamom powder. Stir well.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10-12 minutes, stirring frequently.
5. The halwa should thicken and turn a light golden brown.
6. Remove the saucepan from the heat and let it cool slightly.
7. Stir in the flaky coconut, if using.
8. Serve warm or at room temperature.
